name: Smono 5 Vaporizer
summary: A true-convection dry-herb vaporiser with a colour display, for patients who want even, flavour-led extraction.
description: The Smono 5 is a true-convection device, heating with hot air rather than direct chamber contact for smoother, more flavourful vapour and more consistent results across a session. A full-colour display gives animated feedback on heating status, temperature and session activity, making operation clear at a glance. It runs on a Samsung battery, heats up in under 30 seconds, and has an accessible, removable chamber that's easy to clean. The discreet black finish and glass mouthpiece keep it understated. A 10-year manufacturer warranty backs the build, which makes it a sensible long-term choice for a patient who medicates regularly.
